Examples.Title: Creates a new SSO provider
Create a new signing key for the project in standby status
Examples.Code:
### Create a new signing key for the project in standby status
# @name v1-create-project-signing-key
POST {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/config/auth/signing-keys
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "algorithm": "RS256",
  "status": "standby"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded

Examples.Title: Creates a new third-party auth integration
Examples.Code:
### Creates a new third-party auth integration
# @name v1-create-project-tpa-integration
POST {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/config/auth/third-party-auth
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "oidc_issuer_url": "https://login.acme.com",
  "jwks_url": "https://login.acme.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded

Examples.Title: Updates a SSO provider by its UUID
Examples.Code:
### Updates a SSO provider by its UUID
# @name v1-update-a-sso-provider
PUT {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/config/auth/sso/providers/{{provider_id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "metadata_url": "https://sso.acme.com/metadata.xml",
  "domains": [
    "acme.com",
    "contractors.acme.com"
  ]
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 404
# Description: Either SAML 2.0 was not enabled for this project, or the provider does not exist
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded

Examples.Title: Updates a project's auth config
Examples.Code:
### Updates a project's auth config
# @name v1-update-auth-service-config
PATCH {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/config/auth
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "site_url": "https://app.example.com",
  "disable_signup": false,
  "jwt_exp": 3600
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to update project's auth config

Examples.Title: Update a signing key, mainly its status
Examples.Code:
### Update a signing key, mainly its status
# @name v1-update-project-signing-key
PATCH {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/config/auth/signing-keys/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "status": "standby"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded

Examples.Title: Apply or update billing addons, including compute instance size
Examples.Description: Selects an addon variant, for example scaling the project’s compute instance up or down, and applies it to the project.
Examples.Code:
### Apply or update billing addons, including compute instance size
# @name v1-apply-project-addon
PATCH {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/billing/addons
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "addon_variant": "pitr_7",
  "addon_type": "pitr"
}

## Responses
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to apply project addon

Examples.Title: Apply a database migration
Examples.Description: Only available to selected partner OAuth apps
Examples.Code:
### Apply a database migration
# @name v1-apply-a-migration
POST {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/database/migrations
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Idempotency-Key: {{Idempotency-Key}}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "query": "create table public.widgets(id bigint primary key);",
  "name": "create_widgets_table",
  "rollback": "drop table if exists public.widgets;"
}

## Responses
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to apply database migration

Examples.Title: Authorize user-id to role mappings for JIT access
Examples.Description: Authorizes the request to assume a role in the project database
Examples.Code:
### Authorize user-id to role mappings for JIT access
# @name v1-authorize-jit-access
POST {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/database/jit
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "role": "postgres",
  "rhost": "203.0.113.10"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to authorize database jit access

Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

Examples.Title: [Beta] Run a sql query as supabase_read_only_user
Examples.Description: All entity references must be schema qualified.

POST {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/database/query/read-only
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "query": "select * from pg_stat_activity limit 1;"
}

## Responses
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to run read-only sql query

Examples.Title: Bulk update functions
Examples.Description: Bulk update functions. It will create a new function or replace existing. The operation is idempotent. NOTE: You will need to manually bump the version.
Examples.Code:
### Bulk update functions
# @name v1-bulk-update-functions
PUT {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/functions
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

[
  {
    "id": "3c078cce-ad70-4148-9f37-4da362789053",
    "slug": "hello-world",
    "name": "Hello World",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "version": 2,
    "verify_jwt": true,
    "entrypoint_path": "index.ts"
  }
]

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 402
# Description: Maximum number of functions reached for Plan
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to update functions

Examples.Title: Deploy a function
Examples.Description: A new endpoint to deploy functions. It will create if function does not exist.
Examples.Code:
### Deploy a function
# @name v1-deploy-a-function
POST {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/functions/deploy?slug={{slug}}&bundleOnly={{bundleOnly}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 201
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 402
# Description: Maximum number of functions reached for Plan
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to deploy function

Examples.Title: Update a function
Examples.Description: Updates a function with the specified slug and project.
Examples.Code:
### Update a function
# @name v1-update-a-function
PATCH {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/functions/{{function_slug}}?slug={{slug}}&name={{name}}&verify_jwt={{verify_jwt}}&import_map={{import_map}}&entrypoint_path={{entrypoint_path}}&import_map_path={{import_map_path}}&ezbr_sha256={{ezbr_sha256}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "Hello World",
  "body": "Deno.serve(() =\u003E new Response(\u0027Hello again!\u0027))",
  "verify_jwt": true
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to update function with given slug

Examples.Title: Create a database branch
Examples.Description: Creates a database branch from the specified project.
Examples.Code:
### Create a database branch
# @name v1-create-a-branch
POST {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/branches
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "branch_name": "preview-login-page",
  "git_branch": "feature/login-page",
  "persistent": true,
  "with_data": false,
  "notify_url": "https://example.com/webhooks/branches"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Content-Type: application/json
# 500
# Description: Failed to create database branch

Examples.Title: [Beta] Upgrades the project's Postgres version
Examples.Code:
### [Beta] Upgrades the project's Postgres version
# @name v1-upgrade-postgres-version
POST {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/upgrade
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "target_version": "17",
  "release_channel": "ga"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to initiate project upgrade

Examples.Title: Updates realtime configuration
Examples.Code:
### Updates realtime configuration
# @name v1-update-realtime-config
PATCH {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/config/realtime
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "private_only": false,
  "max_concurrent_users": 1000,
  "max_channels_per_client": 100
}

## Responses
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded

Examples.Title: Updates project's postgrest config
Examples.Code:
### Updates project's postgrest config
# @name v1-update-postgrest-service-config
PATCH {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/postgrest
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "db_schema": "public,storage",
  "db_pool": 20,
  "max_rows": 1000
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to update project's postgrest config

Examples.Title: Bulk create secrets
Examples.Description: Creates multiple secrets and adds them to the specified project.
Examples.Code:
### Bulk create secrets
# @name v1-bulk-create-secrets
POST {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/secrets
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json

[
  {
    "name": "OPENAI_API_KEY",
    "value": "sk-example-secret"
  },
  {
    "name": "STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET",
    "value": "whsec_example"
  }
]

## Responses
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to create project's secrets

Examples.Title: Bulk delete secrets
Examples.Description: Deletes all secrets with the given names from the specified project
Examples.Code:
### Bulk delete secrets
# @name v1-bulk-delete-secrets
DELETE {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/secrets
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json

[
  "OPENAI_API_KEY"
]

## Responses
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to delete secrets with given names

Examples.Title: Creates a new API key for the project
Examples.Code:
### Creates a new API key for the project
# @name v1-create-project-api-key
POST {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/api-keys?reveal={{reveal}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "type": "secret",
  "name": "ci_secret_key",
  "description": "CI deploy key"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded

Examples.Title: [Beta] Updates project's pgsodium config. Updating the root_key can cause all data encrypted with the older key to become inaccessible.
Examples.Code:
### [Beta] Updates project's pgsodium config. Updating the root_key can cause all data encrypted with the older key to become inaccessible.
# @name v1-update-pgsodium-config
PUT {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/pgsodium
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "root_key": "MDEyMzQ1Njc4OWFiY2RlZjAxMjM0NTY3ODlhYmNkZWY="
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
# 500
# Description: Failed to update project's pgsodium config

Examples.Title: Updates an API key for the project
Examples.Code:
### Updates an API key for the project
# @name v1-update-project-api-key
PATCH {{host}}/v1/projects/{{ref}}/api-keys/{{id}}?reveal={{reveal}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "ci_secret_key_rotated",
  "description": "Rotated after March release"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Unauthorized
# 403
# Description: Forbidden action
# 429
# Description: Rate limit exceeded
